name: Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, sugar, and eggs until well combined.
2. Stir in the anise extract, vanilla, and milk.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and anise seeds; add to the wet mixture and stir until just mixed.
4. Shape the dough into a log and chill until firm.
5. Roll out half of the dough on wax paper into a rectangle about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Place the dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until lightly browned, rotating halfway through.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Slice the cooled biscotti into halves, then cut each half diagonally into smaller pieces.
10. Toast in a preheated oven at 300°F for an additional 5 minutes.
